about_text: Welcome! I'm An Ni Xu, a pharmacy student and computer science graduate with a passion for healthcare, web development, and data science, and an interest in machine learning. I enjoy turning ideas into real-world solutions. Let's connect and create together!
master_science_cs: Master of Science in Computer Science (M.Sc.)
bachelor_science_cs_stats: Bachelor of Science in Statistics and Computer Science (B.Sc.)
CE_job1: Analyze and investigate hundreds of health claims, specializing in paramedical services (physiotherapy, podiatry, psychology, chiropractic, massage therapy, and allied health) and vision care, ensuring compliance with policy guidelines.
CE_job2: Interpret benefit contracts and medical documentation to identify billing discrepancies, errors, and potential fraud risks.
CE_job3: Provide bilingual (French/English) support to clients and providers while maintaining productivity and quality targets in a high-volume environment.
phac_dev_job1: Developed an online learning app for the Electronic Traveller Health Information (eTHI) project’s CRM and the K-12 adventure course Tori’s Travels, using HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and Python, serving hundreds of learners per course.
phac_dev_job2: Enhanced the interactivity and accessibility of the learning app, making it more user-friendly and inclusive for individuals with disabilities.
ta_job1: Assisted over 150 students in COMP330: Theory of Computation, covering topics such as finite automata, regular and context-free languages, pushdown automata, models of computation, computability theory, undecidability, and reduction techniques.
ta_job2: Graded assignments and exams, providing constructive feedback to students.
ta_job3: Delivered one-on-one guidance during office hours to help students master complex theoretical concepts.
